state.output:
<path>bench-targets/large-log/math.test.mjs</path>
<content>
1: import test from 'node:test'
2: import assert from 'node:assert/strict'
3: import { add } from './src/math.mjs'
4: 
5: for (let index = 0; index < 80; index += 1) {
6:   test(`add case ${index}`, () => {
7:     assert.equal(add(index, 2), index + 2)
8:   })
9: }
</content>
state.title: bench-targets/large-log/math.test.mjs

part.text: I'll start by reading the benchmark files to understand the issue.

metadata.diff:
Index: /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-22T14-18-01-250Z/openslimedit-large-test-log-debug-1/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
===================================================================
--- /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-22T14-18-01-250Z/openslimedit-large-test-log-debug-1/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
+++ /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-22T14-18-01-250Z/openslimedit-large-test-log-debug-1/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
 export function add(a, b) {
-  return a - b
+  return a + b
 }

filediff.patch:
Index: /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-22T14-18-01-250Z/openslimedit-large-test-log-debug-1/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
===================================================================
--- /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-22T14-18-01-250Z/openslimedit-large-test-log-debug-1/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
+++ /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-22T14-18-01-250Z/openslimedit-large-test-log-debug-1/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
 export function add(a, b) {
-  return a - b
+  return a + b
 }

part.text: I can see the bug. The `add` function in `math.mjs` returns `a - b` (subtraction) instead of `a + b` (addition), while the tests expect addition (`index + 2`).
Now let me verify the fix by running the test:

input.description: Run the test suite to verify the fix

state.title: Run the test suite to verify the fix

part.text:
**Diagnosis & Fix:**

Issue in `bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs:2`:
- Bug: Used `a - b` (subtraction) instead of `a + b` (addition)
